name: Pina Colada Fruit Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade or blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover; blend for 30 seconds (if using a blender, stir after 15 seconds).
3. Refrigerate several hours or overnight to blend flavors.
4. Serve with fresh fruit.
Makes 2 1/2 cups
Nutritional information per 1 tablespoon serving:
Calories: 20, Protein: 0 g, Carbohydrate: 3 g, Fat: 1 g, Cholesterol: 0 mg Sodium: 15 mg, Potassium: 20 mg
